title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.241 - Death benefits, inconsistent with section 287.240, when
text:
287.241.  Death benefits, inconsistent with section 287.240, when. — The dependent and the employer may, by agreement, enter into a structured settlement which provides for different weekly benefits than provided in section 287.240.  Any such settlement must be secured by indemnity insurance issued by a company approved by the Missouri department of commerce and insurance.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1396)
